title: Supervisor
description:
Job Description
  • Site supervision of construction works to meet deadlines
  • Responsible for on-site construction planning, handovers and personnel arrangements and labor deployment
  • Resolve various problems and handling emergencies on the site
  • Liaise and coordinate with both the clients, foreign workers and office to ensure smooth operations
  • Responsible for supervision of foreign workers and their wellbeing, health and safety and others
  • Analyse and evaluate foreign workers and clients issues and feedback to improve client satisfaction
  • Familiar with Singapore roads and traffic rules
  • Transport workers between locations around Singapore
  • Maintain engine and cleanliness of lorry
  • Perform transportation duties as deployed by the supervisor and carry out the duties
  • Perform collection and delivery of goods/materials to required destination
  • Responsible for daily inspection of lorry
  • To assist the Manager in supervising and coordinating the daily operational provision of the facilities at the areas of the dormitory.
  • Acting as Site Warden, to conduct regular inspection of room check and facilities to ensure compliance of the regulation
  • Ensure enforcement on the rules and regulation for the dormitory.
  • Ensure health and safety of the dormitory areas and sites
  • Oversee and ensure site quarter’s conditions and lodging records are in accordance to MOM requirement
  • Monitor and ensure all internal and subcon workers are registered and attendances are properly captured
  • Monitor and ensure the workers’ permits and certificates are valid and updated accordingly
  • To handle feedback and complaints and update the Manager accordingly
  • To take corrective action and implement preventive measures when required
  • To assist in the preparation of monthly reports, annual capital and operating budgets and other relevant reports
  • To ensure that all equipment are in good working condition
  • Have class 4 license
  • Familiar with Singapore roads and traffic rules
  • Transport workers between locations around Singapore

Job Requirements

  • At least a diploma in civil engineering, electrical/mechanical engineering or equivalent
  • Have class 4 driving license
  • Have 5 years and above experience driving in Singapore
  • At least 2-3 years experience in marketing and supervisory roles
  • Able to work with computers, especially MS Excel and Word
  • Able to communicate in english and with foreign workers
  • Responsible and positive with ‘can-do’ attitude
  • Able to work efficiently and effective under high pressure
  • Must be contactable by means of hand phone at any time including weekend and public holidays
  • Willing to work long hours, night work, overtime and Sunday work if required
